CustomField.description: This field indicates the contactability state of the current contact record: • Do not contact - if HasOptedOutOfEmail is true AND HasOptedOutOfPhone is true • Missing contact details - if Email is blank AND Phone are blank • OK to contact - Otherwise.
CustomField.formula: IF( AND(HasOptedOutOfEmail = TRUE, HasOptedOutOfPhone__c = TRUE), "Do not contact", IF( AND(ISBLANK(Email), ISBLANK(Phone)), "Missing contact details", "OK to contact" ) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This field indicates if a contact rather or not reachable, or if the email and the phone are missing.
CustomField.label: Contactability status
